name: mssqlpwner
title: mssqlpwner
description:
Advanced and versatile pentesting tool
MSSqlPwner is an advanced and versatile pentesting tool designed to seamlessly
interact and pwn MSSQL servers. That tool is based on impacket, which allows
attackers to authenticate to databases using clear-text passwords NTLM Hashes,
and kerberos tickets. With MSSqlPwner, users can execute custom commands
through various methods, including custom assembly, `xp_cmdshell`, and
`sp_oacreate(Ole Automation Procedures)` and much more.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use mssqlpwner because Advanced and versatile pentesting tool.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use mssqlpwner as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `mssqlpwner [options] [args]` as documented upstream for mssqlpwner.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair mssqlpwner with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `mssqlpwner --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
